source_method: Built-in image generation for the topic-specific TaraHome residential background, composited with current official product photographs.
post_processing: The official Amazon Echo Dot (5th Gen) and TP-Link Tapo P125M product pixels were isolated, scaled proportionally, and placed on the generated oak console with restrained contact shadows. No device shape, control, logo, or hardware detail was generated.

visual_review.full_size: PASS — the current Echo Dot and Matter smart plug are recognizable, proportionate, and naturally placed in a warm residential scene.
visual_review.article_16x10_crop: PASS — both devices and the restrained dark-green residential accent remain clear in the centered article crop.
visual_review.card_16x9_crop: PASS — both products remain fully visible and legible at library-card size without awkward edge cropping.
visual_review.prohibited_elements: PASS — no embedded headline, fake chart, decorative route line, translucent panel, inset frame, floating UI card, progress bar, generic diagram, or invented hardware.
